title: LakeForcing-OpenDrift: an open pipeline for hydrodynamic and wind-wave forcing of inland lakes to drive Lagrangian transport models
description: Open Python pipeline that assembles bathymetry (HydroLAKES/GLOBathy/DAHITI) and ERA5 meteorology, auto-configures and runs a coupled Delft3D-FLOW + Delft3D-WAVE simulation for any inland lake, and exports CF-compliant NetCDF that drives the OpenDrift particle tracker. Core contribution: a sigma-layer to z-level coupling. Includes generated forcing for 12 demonstration lakes on all inhabited continents.
